title: VerificationDebt
description: A per-project ledger of what is asserted-but-not-fully-verified, keeping coverage gaps visible and bounded. Research-only: this record tracks verification gaps; it does not authorize or trigger any financial action. Outstanding high-risk debt blocks promotion. See docs/verification_debt_policy.md and docs/promotion_policy.md.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema the record conforms to.

report_id.description: Stable unique id for this verification-debt report.

unverified_assumptions.description: Assumptions relied upon but not yet verified.

missing_tests.description: Checks/tests that should exist but do not yet.

lookahead_risks.description: Places where future information may have leaked into analysis.

survivorship_bias_risks.description: Places where dropped/delisted/closed items may bias results.

config_drift_risks.description: Risks from thresholds/criteria changing without re-validation.

overconfidence_risks.description: Places where confidence may exceed what evidence supports.

required_next_verifications.description: Concrete verification steps to pay down this debt, ideally risk-ordered.

promotion_blockers.description: Debt items that currently block promotion to a higher stage.
